title: IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Research Scientist Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has declared the latest job notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation, Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply before the las...
